so it's a little bit different than putting FAQs at the bottom of a page and more of a test of, like, this should be at least good enough for the average user if they actually, of course, read it and can rank in SEO.

But this is more of a It's kind of like where the idea came from is kind of, you know, the traditional glossary page, which is like designed for SEO, right, where it's pulling those keywords that people search for and they find you that way.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and plan future SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Pipeline Shift:** The editorial focus will broaden from Airbyte Flex to general topics. Production will ramp to \~36 pages/week (30 industry pages) to finish the industry page project by EOY.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [**LLM Traffic Volatility:** A recent 31% drop in ChatGPT citations is a market-wide trend, likely due to algorithm changes designed to keep users on-platform. Airbyte's performance is strong relative to competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [**New SEO Test Proposed:** An "AEO Glossary" test will create dedicated Q\&A pages (not in-article FAQs) to capture LLM traffic. This is a higher-risk, higher-reward experiment than the TLDR test.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [**TLDR Test Outcome:** The TLDR experiment yielded mixed results for LLM traffic but is a low-risk SEO win. The team will add TLDRs to all new content and consider a bulk update for the "Data Engineering Resources" section.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)

## Topics

### LLM Traffic & Market Context

  - [**Problem:** LLM referral traffic growth has slowed, a trend confirmed by both GA4 and Scrunch data.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [**Context:** This is a market-wide phenomenon. Profound research shows a 31% drop in ChatGPT citations for brands over the last three weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [**Cause:** Algorithm changes are likely designed to keep users on-platform, reducing outbound links.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [**Airbyte Performance:** Airbyte is outperforming competitors in LLM citations, according to Scrunch data.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)

### TLDR Experiment Results

  - [**Goal:** Test the impact of adding a "TLDR" (Too Long; Didn't Read) summary at the top of articles.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [**Outcome:** The test yielded mixed results for LLM traffic across platforms (GA4 data).](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
      - [**ChatGPT:** Showed a positive session increase.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
      - [**Other LLMs:** Results were inconsistent, with some showing wins but no net session increase.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [**Decision:** The team will add TLDRs to all new content.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
      - [**Rationale:** It's a low-risk practice that doesn't harm user experience and provides a small, consistent SEO benefit.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
      - [**Consideration:** A bulk update for the "Data Engineering Resources" section (1k–2k articles) was discussed.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)

### Proposed "AEO Glossary" Experiment

  - [**Proposal:** Test a new AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) strategy using dedicated Q\&A pages.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [**Methodology:**](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
      - [**Research:** Scrape Reddit to identify primary questions and related sub-questions on a topic.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
      - [**Execution:** Create a simple, Q\&A-style glossary page focused on a single theme.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This format is designed for easy LLM ingestion, unlike FAQs buried at the bottom of articles.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [**Risk:** Potential for SEO cannibalization with existing articles.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
      - [**Mitigation:** Use `no-index` tags or `robots.txt` to restrict the pages to LLM-only visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)

### Content Production & Pipeline

  - [**Production:** The team is now working one week ahead on content.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [**Editorial Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
      - [The final batch of Airbyte Flex/hybrid deployment pages will be published next week.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
      - [The focus will then shift to a broader mix of general data topics.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [**Industry Pages Project:**](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
      - [Production will ramp to 30 pages/week.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
      - [**Goal:** Complete the project by EOY 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
      - [**Significance:** This frees up engineering time for "use case one" setup and creates a content buffer for its launch.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [**Thumbnails:** Final tweaks are complete; files will be delivered today.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
      - [Deliver next week's content to Tanmay for review.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
      - [Deliver final thumbnails to Tanmay today.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [**Tanmay:**](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
      - [Review next week's content.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
      - [Review the Scrunch prompts and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [**Kyle:**](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
      - [Provide a detailed overview of the "AEO Glossary" test to the team.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
      - [Add TLDRs to all new editorial and programmatic content.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
      - [Schedule a new weekly sync time to accommodate Kyle's schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/4wxzshDHZDLzeyLBasu664VK9ED_MPKU?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)

action_items.description: Reschedule weekly sync to avoid Kyle's school drop-off
Send FAQ/glossary overview to Airbyte team; then scope/launch AEO test
Add TLDRs to all Data Engineering Resources pages
Review scrunch prompts; send updates to Carrie
